p.em: Intel Manual Grade Specification - TCP/IP Stack Implementation Reference

ul.li: Rule 1: Samples for retransmitted segments MUST NOT influence SRTT.
Rule 2: The RTO backoff is maintained until an ACK is received for a non-retransmitted segment.

p.em: Prevents RTO corruption from ACK ambiguity.

g.title: Timer running for oldest unacked segment
Timer reached zero; segment loss assumed
